projects.title: ShopFlow Enterprise
projects.description: A headless enterprise e-commerce platform handling 2M+ monthly transactions with real-time inventory management across 15 warehouses, Stripe payment processing, and an AI-powered admin dashboard with predictive analytics and automated reporting.

projects.title: TaskFlow Enterprise
projects.description: Enterprise project management suite serving 500+ teams with real-time collaboration via WebSockets, AI-powered sprint planning, resource allocation, time tracking with billing integration, and automated workflow triggers with SLA enforcement.

projects.title: PropVue Enterprise
projects.description: Enterprise real estate platform managing 50K+ property listings with advanced geospatial search, AI-driven property valuation, virtual tour integration, automated lead scoring, and a comprehensive CRM for 2000+ agents.

projects.title: SocialPulse Enterprise
projects.description: Enterprise social media intelligence platform aggregating data from 8+ platforms for 1000+ brands. Features AI sentiment analysis, competitor benchmarking, automated content scheduling, and executive-level reporting with ROI attribution.

projects.title: DineSync
projects.description: Restaurant management platform with intelligent table booking, order management, menu customization, real-time availability tracking, and an admin dashboard. Built from scratch with Vue 3, Express, and SQLite.

projects.title: FitTrack Enterprise
projects.description: Enterprise wellness platform used by 200+ corporations with AI-personalized training programs, wearable device integration (Apple Watch, Fitbit, Garmin), biometric data analysis, team challenges, and comprehensive health analytics dashboards.

projects.title: LearnHub Enterprise
projects.description: Enterprise LMS platform serving 100K+ learners with adaptive learning paths, AI course recommendations, SCORM compliance, video streaming at scale, automated certification, and detailed analytics for corporate training departments.

projects.title: ChatGenie Enterprise
projects.description: Enterprise customer communication platform handling 1M+ conversations monthly with AI chatbot, intelligent routing, omnichannel integration (web, WhatsApp, Messenger, email), real-time agent assist, CSAT tracking, and workforce management.

projects.title: BagStyle DZ
projects.description: A fully-featured Arabic e-commerce platform for luxury handbags with guest checkout, order tracking, RTL support, admin dashboard, product variants, reviews, banners management, and marketing pixels integration.
